title: Amethystized (Pojavtimized)
description: A modpack for amethyst launcher ( optionally pojav launcher ) that makes your game run way better than before using Sodium and MobileGlues!
body:
# Amethystized (earlier Pojavtimized) - Amethyst launcher optimization modpack This modpack includes various mods from fabric to improve your game performance.

There is also a mod that will give you controller support for any controller! (just calibrate it)

Sodium works with the modpack by using **MobileGlues** renderer and [Podium](https://modrinth.com/mod/podium) mod where both mods are already included inside the pack.
Java Arguments - reduced stuttering and garbage collection -XX:+UnlockExperimentalVMOptions -XX:+UseG1GC -Dsun.rmi.dgc.server.gcInterval=3600000 -XX:G1NewSizePercent=20 -XX:G1ReservePercent=20 -XX:MaxGCPauseMillis=50 -XX:G1HeapRegionSize=32M
This will help you reduce stutters and improve garbage collection. ### How to play this modpack on Pojav launcher? Simply try to use LTW renderer and if it doesn't work, remove sodium and mods requiring it. Versions added: - 1.21.1->1.21.11
